text: I wake up at 6:30 every morning. First, I drink a glass of water and do a short stretching routine. After a quick shower, I have breakfast, usually oatmeal with fruit. I leave for work at 8:00 and arrive at the office by 9:00. My workday includes meetings and focused tasks until lunch at 12:30. In the afternoon, I continue working until 5:00. After work, I go for a 30-minute jog or a bike ride. Then I have dinner, relax by reading or watching a show, and prepare for the next day. I’m in bed by 10:30. This daily consistency helps me stay productive and healthy.
